summary: Made surgical seam edits to support the chapter 10 to chapter 11 handoff by pre-staging the survey kit, the school spud bar, and Hester's muslin while preserving the chapter's existing opening, beats, and voice.
edits: Changed Otto's survey stake mention to one of a kept set, seeding the multiple stakes and folding rule used at the basin next chapter.
Added the school furnace-shed spud bar to Thea's supplies so chapter 11's tool inventory lands cleanly.
Placed Otto's folding rule and a square of faded muslin into the wagon loading sequence to bridge directly into chapter 11's opening details.
